### `{r} sR$headings$secondary_bsi`

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeIntroductionTexts"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_tbl-intro-secondary-bsi.qmd")
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\FloatBarrier
:::

```{r}
#| output: asis
#| label: tbl-secondary-bsi-rates
#| tbl-cap: !expr 'sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$`tbl-cap`'
#| tbl-cap-location: top

check_outlier_interpretation <- FALSE

# Conditionally render table only if department data exists
if (!is.null(benchmark_data$secondary_bsi_rate_table) && 
    sum(benchmark_data$secondary_bsi_rate_table$n_own, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) {
  
  # Check if reference data columns exist
  has_reference <- "pooled_ref" %in% names(benchmark_data$secondary_bsi_rate_table)
  check_outlier_interpretation <- has_reference

  tbl_data <- benchmark_data$secondary_bsi_rate_table

  tbl <- tbl_data |>
    dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of("n_ref")) |>
    dplyr::rename(
      !!sR$table_headers$n := "n_own",
      !!sR$table_headers$rate := "pooled_own",
      !!sR$table_headers$pooled := tidyselect::any_of("pooled_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q1 := tidyselect::any_of("q1_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q2 := tidyselect::any_of("q2_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q3 := tidyselect::any_of("q3_ref"))

  if (include_ci) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      dplyr::rename(
        !!sR$table_headers$ci := tidyselect::any_of("ci_lower_own"),
        ci_upper_hide = tidyselect::any_of("ci_upper_own")
      ) |>
      dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of(c("ci_lower_ref", "ci_upper_ref")))
  } else {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of(c(
        "ci_lower_own", "ci_upper_own", "ci_lower_ref", "ci_upper_ref",
        "q1_ci_lower_ref", "q1_ci_upper_ref",
        "q2_ci_lower_ref", "q2_ci_upper_ref",
        "q3_ci_lower_ref", "q3_ci_upper_ref")))
  }

  tbl <- tbl |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      Infection = dplyr::case_match(
        as.character(.data$event_type_key),
        "nec" ~ sR$necrotising_enterocolitis_sc,
        "ssi" ~ sR$surgical_site_infection_sc,
        "hap" ~ sR$pneumonia_sc),
      .keep = "unused") |>
    gt(rowname_col = "Infection") |>
    sub_missing() |>
    gt::tab_options(
      latex.header_repeat = TRUE,
      latex.use_longtable = TRUE,
      table.width = pct(100),
      table.font.size = 13,
      footnotes.marks = "extended"
    ) |>
    fmt_number(
      columns = c(
        tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$rate),
        tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$pooled),
        tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$q1),
        tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$q2),
        tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$q3)),
      decimals = 1,
      sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
      min_sep_threshold = 2,
      locale = locale_gt) |>
    fmt_integer(
      columns = sR$table_headers$n,
      sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
      min_sep_threshold = 2) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = list(
        cells_column_spanners(),
        cells_column_labels(),
        cells_row_groups()
      )
    ) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sprintf(
        sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$n_footnote,
        sR$table_headers$n),
      locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$n)
    ) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sprintf(
        sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$rate_footnote,
        sR$table_headers$rate),
      locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$rate)
    )

  if (include_ci && sR$table_headers$ci %in% colnames(tbl$`_data`)) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      gt::cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$ci, "ci_upper_hide"),
        pattern = "{1}\u2013{2}"
      )
    if ("q1_ci_lower_ref" %in% colnames(tbl$`_data`)) {
      tbl <- tbl |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q1, "q1_ci_lower_ref", "q1_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})"
        ) |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q2, "q2_ci_lower_ref", "q2_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})"
        ) |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q3, "q3_ci_lower_ref", "q3_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})"
        )
    }
  }

  if (has_reference) {
    ci_in_own <- include_ci && sR$table_headers$ci %in% colnames(tbl$`_data`)
    if (ci_in_own) {
      tbl <- tbl |>
        cols_width(
          stub() ~ pct(28),
          sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(8),
          sR$table_headers$rate ~ pct(10),
          sR$table_headers$ci ~ pct(12),
          sR$table_headers$pooled ~ pct(10),
          sR$table_headers$q1 ~ pct(10),
          sR$table_headers$q2 ~ pct(10),
          sR$table_headers$q3 ~ pct(12)
        )
    } else {
      tbl <- tbl |>
        cols_width(
          stub() ~ pct(40),
          sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(10),
          sR$table_headers$rate ~ pct(10),
          sR$table_headers$pooled ~ pct(10),
          sR$table_headers$q1 ~ pct(10),
          sR$table_headers$q2 ~ pct(10),
          sR$table_headers$q3 ~ pct(10)
        )
    }
    own_cols <- c(sR$table_headers$n, sR$table_headers$rate)
    if (ci_in_own) own_cols <- c(own_cols, sR$table_headers$ci)
    tbl <- tbl |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$own_data_label,
        columns = tidyselect::any_of(own_cols),
        id = "department_data"
      ) |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$reference_data,
        columns = c(
          sR$table_headers$pooled,
          sR$table_headers$q1,
          sR$table_headers$q2,
          sR$table_headers$q3),
        id = "reference_data"
      ) |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$rate_name,
        columns = tidyselect::any_of(
          c(
            sR$table_headers$rate,
            sR$table_headers$pooled,
            sR$table_headers$q1,
            sR$table_headers$q2,
            sR$table_headers$q3)),
        id = "secondary_bsi_rate",
        level = 2
      ) |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = md(
          paste0(
            "$$\\text{",
            sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$rate_name,
            "} = \\frac{\\text{",
            sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$rate_numerator,
            "}}{\\text{",
            sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$rate_denominator,
            "}} \\times ",
            format_integer(100),
            "$$"
          )),
        locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "secondary_bsi_rate")
      ) |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = sprintf(
          sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$pooled_footnote,
          sR$table_headers$pooled),
        locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$pooled)) |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = sprintf(
          sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$quartile_footnote,
          sR$table_headers$q1,
          sR$table_headers$q2,
          sR$table_headers$q3,
          sprintf("%i%s", 25L, sR$percent_symbol),
          sprintf("%i%s", 50L, sR$percent_symbol),
          sprintf("%i%s", 75L, sR$percent_symbol)
        ),
        locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c(
          sR$table_headers$q1,
          sR$table_headers$q2,
          sR$table_headers$q3))) |>
      tab_source_note(source_note = sR$pooled_rate_note)
  } else {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      cols_width(
        stub() ~ pct(60),
        sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(20),
        sR$table_headers$rate ~ pct(20)
      ) |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$`tbl-secondary-bsi-rates`$rate_name,
        columns = tidyselect::any_of(
          c(
            sR$table_headers$rate)),
        id = "secondary_bsi_rate"
      )
  }

  if (any(tbl_data$n_own < 10, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    sparse_note <- if (include_ci) sR$sparse_data_footnote else sR$sparse_data_footnote_no_ci
    tbl <- tbl |>
      gt::tab_footnote(footnote = sparse_note)
  }

  tbl
} else {
  no_data_table()
}
```

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeOutlierInterpretation"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
if (check_outlier_interpretation) {
  states <- metric_registry$secondary_bsi_rate_table
  if (has_outliers(states)) {
    grouped <- group_outliers(states, "secondary_bsi_rate_table", sR, metric_registry)
    outlier_text <- format_outlier_text(grouped, sR)
    if (nchar(outlier_text) > 0) {
      cat("\n\n::: {.callout-tip}\n")
      cat("## ", sR$outlier$heading, "\n\n")
      cat(outlier_text, "\n")
      cat(":::\n")
    }
  } else if (!is.null(states) && length(states) > 0 &&
             all(states == "no_benchmark")) {
    cat("\n\n::: {.callout-tip}\n")
    cat("## ", sR$outlier$heading, "\n\n")
    cat("- ", sR$outlier$caution_limited_data, "\n")
    cat(":::\n")
  }
}
```
:::
